chosen.theme: AI Capex Supercycle Redirects Institutional Flows Into Semiconductors — Chip ETFs Dominate 2026 Inflows as Big Tech Loses Narrative Leadership
chosen.news_one_liner: Constellation Energy's earnings beat and Micron's surge confirm AI capex demand is broadening from GPU compute into memory chips and nuclear power infrastructure, lifting the full AI supply chain.

candidates.theme: AI Capex Supercycle Redirects Institutional Flows Into Semiconductors — Chip ETFs Dominate 2026 Inflows as Big Tech Loses Narrative Leadership
candidates.news_one_liner: Constellation Energy's earnings beat and Micron's surge confirm AI capex demand is broadening from GPU compute into memory chips and nuclear power infrastructure, lifting the full AI supply chain.

candidates.theme: Trump-Xi Summit Imminent — US-China Trade War Ceasefire Potential Emerges as Highest-Impact Binary Catalyst for Global Equities
candidates.news_one_liner: Trump-Xi summit goes live this week alongside CPI/PPI data, making it the highest-stakes binary macro event of the cycle for global equities and tech.

candidates.theme: KOSPI Record High Divergence — Samsung and SK Hynix AI Semiconductor Demand Decouples Korean Equities From Global Risk-Off
candidates.news_one_liner: KOSPI hits record high as Samsung and SK Hynix AI chip demand overrides global risk-off, pulling EM fund inflows away from India and China.

candidates.theme: PLA Leadership Purge Escalation — Suspended Death Sentences for Two Former Defense Ministers Signal Sustained Chinese Military Command Instability
candidates.news_one_liner: China's death sentences for two ex-defense ministers deepen PLA command uncertainty, raising tail-risk premiums for Taiwan-exposed tech and semiconductor names.

candidates.theme: Data Center Sovereignty and Resource Constraints — AI Expansion Triggers Regulatory Friction Over Energy, Water, and Digital Sovereignty
candidates.news_one_liner: Governments classifying AI data centers as critical infrastructure add compliance costs and permitting delays for MSFT, GOOGL, and AMZN's expansion plans.
